Bash(osascript << 'EOF'
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        set frontmost to true
        delay 0.3
        -- 시뮬레이터 창에서 첫 번째 창의 위치와 크기 가져오기
        set winPos to position of window 1
        set winSize to size of window 1
        return "pos: " & \(item 1 of winPos as string\) & "," & \(item 2 of winPos as string\) & " size: " & \(item 1 of winSize as string\) & "," & \(item 2 of winSize as string\)
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(osascript << 'EOF'
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        set frontmost to true
        delay 0.5
        -- 창 위치: x=653, y=49, 크기: 461x987
        -- "허용 안 함" 버튼 좌표 계산 \(창 내 상대 좌표 → 절대 좌표\)
        -- 화면에서 버튼이 약 x=218/393, y=625/852 상대 위치 \(비율로 계산\)
        -- 실제 클릭: 창 내 약 좌측 1/4 지점의 높이 약 2/3
        set btnX to 653 + \(461 * 218 / 393\)
        set btnY to 49 + \(987 * 625 / 852\)
        click at {btnX, btnY}
        return "클릭: " & \(btnX as integer\) & ", " & \(btnY as integer\)
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(osascript -e '
tell application "Simulator"
    activate
end tell
delay 1
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        set w to front window
        set b to bounds of w
        return b
    end tell
end tell')

Bash(osascript -e '
tell application "Simulator"
    activate
end tell
delay 2
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        set winList to windows
        set result to ""
        repeat with w in winList
            set result to result & name of w & ": " & \(position of w as string\) & " size:" & \(size of w as string\) & "\\n"
        end repeat
        return result
    end tell
end tell')

Bash(/bin/bash -c '
UDID="A335FD6F-6F67-4B43-A586-2924B1FE52C1"
BUNDLE="com.restart.PrayAnswer"
SCREENSHOTS="/Users/bear/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/AppleAcademy/Xcode/PrayAnswer/Screenshots/v1.10/iPhone67"

# Open Simulator.app with specific device
open -a Simulator --args -CurrentDeviceUDID $UDID
sleep 10

# Verify booted
STATE=$\(xcrun simctl list devices | grep "$UDID" | grep -o "Booted\\|Shutdown"\)
echo "State: $STATE"

# Launch app
xcrun simctl launch $UDID $BUNDLE
sleep 5

echo "App launched"
xcrun simctl list devices | grep "$UDID"
')

Bash(osascript -e '
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        set frontmost to true
    end tell
end tell
delay 0.3

-- Window: x=625, y=39, w=459, h=983
-- Screen left: ~640, Screen top: ~75
-- 4 tabs, each ~107.5pt wide
-- Tab bar Y: ~39+983-75 = ~947

-- Click Tab 0 \(기도 목록\): screen_left + 107.5*0.5 = 640+54 = 694, tab_y = 947
tell application "System Events"
    click at {694, 947}
end tell')

Bash(osascript << 'EOF'
tell application "Simulator" to activate
delay 1

tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        tell window 1
            -- Try to find and click the tab bar button
            set allElements to entire contents
            repeat with el in allElements
                try
                    if description of el contains "기도 목록" then
                        click el
                        return "clicked 기도 목록"
                    end if
                end try
            end repeat
        end tell
    end tell
end tell
return "not found"
EOF)

Bash(osascript << 'EOF'
tell application "Simulator" to activate
delay 1
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        tell window 1
            -- List all buttons and their descriptions
            set result to ""
            set allButtons to buttons
            repeat with btn in allButtons
                try
                    set result to result & "button: [" & description of btn & "] role:" & role of btn & "\\n"
                end try
            end repeat
            -- also check groups
            set allGroups to groups
            set result to result & "groups count: " & \(count of allGroups\) & "\\n"
            return result
        end tell
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(osascript << 'EOF'
tell application "Simulator" to activate
delay 1
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        tell window 1
            tell group 1
                -- Find tab bar buttons
                set result to ""
                set allElements to entire contents
                set i to 0
                repeat with el in allElements
                    set i to i + 1
                    try
                        set r to role of el
                        set d to description of el
                        if r is "AXButton" then
                            set result to result & i & ": [" & d & "]\\n"
                        end if
                    end try
                    if i > 200 then exit repeat
                end repeat
                return result
            end tell
        end tell
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(osascript << 'EOF'
tell application "Simulator" to activate
delay 1
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        tell window 1
            tell group 1
                set allElements to entire contents
                set myResult to ""
                set i to 0
                repeat with el in allElements
                    set i to i + 1
                    try
                        set r to role of el
                        set d to description of el
                        if r is "AXRadioButton" then
                            set myResult to myResult & i & ": RadioButton [" & d & "]\\n"
                        end if
                    end try
                    if i > 300 then exit repeat
                end repeat
                return myResult
            end tell
        end tell
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(osascript << 'EOF'
tell application "Simulator" to activate
delay 1
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        tell window 1
            tell group 1
                set allElements to entire contents
                set myResult to ""
                set i to 0
                repeat with el in allElements
                    set i to i + 1
                    try
                        set r to role of el
                        set d to description of el
                        if r is "AXButton" or r is "AXRadioButton" or r is "AXCell" then
                            if d contains "기도" or d contains "통계" then
                                set myResult to myResult & i & ": " & r & " [" & d & "]\\n"
                            end if
                        end if
                    end try
                    if i > 500 then exit repeat
                end repeat
                return myResult
            end tell
        end tell
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

delay 0.5
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        tell window 1
            tell group 1
                set allElements to entire contents
                set targetEl to item 50 of allElements
                click targetEl
                return "clicked: " & description of targetEl
            end tell
        end tell
    end tell
end tell
EOF)
Bash(/bin/bash -c 'sleep 2 && xcrun simctl io AD1838F8-869C-4C67-A4EB-92968A1E6AF6 screenshot /tmp/ipad_stats.png && echo "OK"')
Bash(/bin/bash -c 'cp /tmp/ipad_stats.png "/Users/bear/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/AppleAcademy/Xcode/PrayAnswer/Screenshots/v1.10/iPad13/02_statistics.png" && echo "02 saved"')

Bash(/bin/bash -c '
UDID="AD1838F8-869C-4C67-A4EB-92968A1E6AF6"
APP="/Users/bear/Library/Developer/Xcode/DerivedData/PrayAnswer-dmzhklxumxlwsifrmgontgwgkmuu/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/PrayAnswer.app"
xcrun simctl terminate $UDID com.restart.PrayAnswer 2>/dev/null
xcrun simctl install $UDID "$APP"
sleep 1
xcrun simctl launch $UDID com.restart.PrayAnswer
sleep 5
echo "Done"
')

Bash(osascript << 'EOF'
tell application "Simulator" to activate
delay 2
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        tell window 1
            tell group 1
                set allElements to entire contents
                set myResult to ""
                set i to 0
                repeat with el in allElements
                    set i to i + 1
                    try
                        set r to role of el
                        set d to description of el
                        if r is "AXButton" and \(d contains "통계" or d contains "기도"\) then
                            set myResult to myResult & i & ": [" & d & "]\\n"
                        end if
                    end try
                    if i > 300 then exit repeat
                end repeat
                return myResult
            end tell
        end tell
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(osascript << 'EOF'
tell application "Simulator" to activate
delay 2
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        set winNames to {}
        repeat with w in windows
            set end of winNames to name of w
        end repeat
        return winNames
    end tell
end tell
EOF)
Bash(/bin/bash -c 'open -a Simulator --args -CurrentDeviceUDID AD1838F8-869C-4C67-A4EB-92968A1E6AF6 && sleep 8 && xcrun simctl list devices | grep "AD1838F8"')

sleep 6

')

# Shutdown iPhone first

# Open Simulator with iPad

xcrun simctl list devices | grep -E "A335FD6F|AD1838F8"
')

Bash(osascript << 'EOF'
tell application "Simulator" to activate
delay 1
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        tell window 1
            tell group 1
                set allElements to entire contents
                set myResult to ""
                set i to 0
                repeat with el in allElements
                    set i to i + 1
                    try
                        if role of el is "AXButton" and \(description of el contains "통계" or description of el contains "기도 추가"\) then
                            set myResult to myResult & i & ": [" & description of el & "]\\n"
                        end if
                    end try
                    if i > 300 then exit repeat
                end repeat
                return myResult
            end tell
        end tell
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(osascript << 'EOF'
tell application "Simulator" to activate
delay 0.5
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Simulator"
        tell window 1
            tell group 1
                set allElements to entire contents
                set i to 0
                repeat with el in allElements
                    set i to i + 1
                    try
                        if role of el is "AXButton" and description of el contains "통계" then
                            click el
                            return "clicked 통계 at " & i
                        end if
                    end try
                    if i > 300 then exit repeat
                end repeat
            end tell
        end tell
    end tell
end tell
EOF)
